info.title: Carna Console Runner
info.description:
Runs the fixtures in the specified assemblies.
If an assembly or settings file is not specified,
carna-runner searches the current working
directory for a settings file that has a file name
that is 'carna-runner-settings.json' and uses that
file.

options.name: --settings
options.description:
Specifies a carna runner settings file path.
(Short form: -s or /s)

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Specifies a pattern of a full name of a fixture
method that is executed with the regular expression.
(Short form: -f or /f)
--pause or /pause
Specifies to wait for a user input before running
the fixtures. (Short form: -p or /p)
--help or /help
Displays this usage message.
(Short form: -h, -?, /h or /?)
